title: ContextBudgetDecision
description: Decision about context budget mode and allowed/blocked sources for a chat turn.

max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input tokens allowed for this turn

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens reserved for this turn

allowed_context_sources.description: Context source types that may contribute to the prompt

blocked_context_sources.description: Context source types explicitly blocked from contributing

allowed_model_tiers.description: Model cost/capability tiers that may be used in this mode

reason_codes.description: Reason codes explaining how this decision was reached

fail_closed.description: If true, ambiguous or unknown inputs default to the most restrictive mode
